title: Attempted theft of George Washington's skull
body: In 1830, an attempt was made to steal the skull from the remains of American president George Washington, which resided in a tomb at Mount Vernon. Instead, the thief mistakenly removed the skull from the remains of one of Judge Bushrod Washington's in-laws. The desecration of the burial site prompted a new, more secure, burial vault to be constructed.
categories: All Wikipedia articles written in American English
Individual human heads, skulls and brains
Tombs of presidents of the United States
